links.label: ∞ How do we help students learn to interpret the Bible?

items.title: Recap
items.content: Connect to previous lessons by asking students to recall where they left off.

items.title: Read
items.content: Read the chapter or selection aloud and move at the students' pace.

lessons.title: The Pharaoh Goes Against the Jewish People

linkReference.label: Click THIS text or scan the QR code for links.

blocks.label: NOTE
blocks.content: The emphasis of lessons will be on the Scripture reading.

blocks.label: INTRO
blocks.content: This year we will focus on the Pentateuch and God's redemptive story.

linkReference.label: Click THIS text or scan the QR code for links.

blocks.label: PREP
blocks.content: Print out a map for each student.

blocks.label: INTRO
blocks.content: This year, we will read through the book of Luke.

blocks.label: NOTEBOOK
blocks.content: Begin a title page and glue in the map.

linkReference.label: Click THIS text or scan the QR code for links.

blocks.label: RECAP
blocks.content: What do you recall about our reading in Exodus?

items.title: Examination
items.content: Tell what you know of two of the plagues on Egypt OR tell what you know of the life of Moses before he became leader of Israel.

items.title: Examination
items.content: Tell about two of the miracles Jesus performed OR tell about two of the parables Jesus told.
